videos.title: Myths About Diamonds: Crash Course Geology #8
videos.author: CrashCourse
videos.description: Diamonds are a girl’s best friend. But they’re so much more than that. They’re sources of power, wealth, and conflict. They’re tickets into Earth’s deep, ancient past. videos.title: How Do Gems Form?: Crash Course Geology #7
videos.author: CrashCourse
videos.description: For most of human history, one thing has been true  – we LOVE shiny things. Gems are the crown jewels (pun intended) of geology, and for thousands of years, we’ve wanted to know all about them.
